body.title: Consequence check: escalation handoff protocol
body.result: CLEAR: DickSimnel escalation summaries written to ticket body; inference device logs tier-escalation at INFO; 2-hop ceiling enforced; no cascade observed
body.intention: I intend that this ticket verifies escalation handoffs reduce re-derivation cost and that no runaway escalation loop is possible.
body.description:
**What changed:** DickSimnel and inference device now produce structured summaries at escalation time.
**Predicted unintended effects:** DickSimnel summary may be too terse or too verbose. Inference device could cascade if ceiling not enforced. Higher tier may receive inconsistent what-now? responses.
**Signals to watch:** Escalation INFO logs show summary length. DickSimnel ticket bodies have populated summaries. No cascade beyond 2 hops.
**Gate condition:** Fires after T-inference-tier-escalation-summary closes.

**Worst-case token spend:**
  - Per-failure cost: ~2000-5000 tokens per escalation event (summary assembly + higher-tier invocation)
  - Hard cap: 2-hop ceiling enforced in inference device code (T-inference-tier-escalation-summary)
  - Blast radius: without ceiling, cheap→expensive→??? could cascade indefinitely; ceiling makes blast radius bounded at 1 extra invocation

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Verify summaries populated and useful; confirm no runaway escalation; annotate outcome and close.
**Completion criteria:** Outcome annotated (occurred / clear / partial) and ticket closed.
